title: pleurospermum obtusiusculum
intro: Pleurospermum obtusiusculum, also known as mountain carrot or New Zealand carrot, is a plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae) native to New Zealand. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which have been traditionally applied to treat various health issues. The plant's roots, leaves, and seeds are rich in essential oils and have been used to alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions. Pleurospermum obtusiusculum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used fresh in salads or as a cooking ingredient.
